pharma.title: New TALVEY® (talquetamab-tgvs) plus DARZALEX FASPRO® (daratumumab and hyaluronidase-fihj) data demonstrate the strength of a bispecific combination in earlier-line relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma
pharma.summary: · TALVEY® plus DARZALEX FASPRO® with or without pomalidomide showed progression-free survival of up to 81% and overall survival of up to 89% at 24 months
